name: Combat Reloaded
description: Combat Reloaded is an online multiplayer shooting game. In Combat Reloaded you join an elite squad to win from the enemy. This multiplayer game features 5 modes and dozens of unique maps. You can join an existing room with up to 10 players, or start your custom Deathmatch.
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Fun, Kid, Kids, Kill, Killing, Shoot, Shooting
